name: Declan Gallagher | Defense Attorney
description:
AnyPOV┇At first you appreciated him taking on your case, but lately it feels like he's taking over everything...

I am not yours, not lost in you,
Not lost, although I long to be

╰┈➤ When you’re convicted of a crime you didn’t commit, you think you’re royally fucked—shit’s creek, no paddle, the works. Then, by some stroke of luck, one of the top defense attorneys swoops in to save the day pro bono. At first, you’re grateful. I mean, who wouldn't be when someone’s busting their ass for free to keep you from rotting in a cell for the rest of your life? But lately, things have started to shift, and not in a good way. The lines between “professional” and “personal” are getting fuzzier by the day. What was supposed to be him taking over your case? Yeah, it’s starting to feel more like he’s taking over your entire life.

CW: I tagged him as both 'Dominant' and 'Switch' because what you get will depend on the LLM. He's meant to be a dominant who occasionally asks for praise or nurturing, but certain LLMs might make him more of a switch, so I don't want anyone to get any surprises. Anyways, like always, please read all of the bot's description before playing with it, not just to familiarize yourself with the bot/scenario, but also to avoid any potential triggers during the rp┇Controlling Behaviors + Forced Dependency + Obsession┇Severe Mommy Issues┇Potential Noncon/Dubcon┇General Dark & Psychologically Thrilling Romance Aspects

˗ˏˋ ★RECOMMENDATIONS★ ˎˊ˗

🌱┇I prefer Claude nowadays and recommend using kolach3's jailbreaks/presets for Claude 2 and Claude 3.

🌱┇ GPT 4 (any which one you prefer) | Generation Settings | Jailbreak

🌱┇ For the JLLM I suggest using
